title: Gut microbiome is associated with radiotherapy response in lung cancer patients with brain metastases
claims: The gut microbiome composition and functional characteristics in lung cancer patients with brain metastases prior to radiotherapy are associated with therapeutic response.

title: Moxibustion Regulates the BRG1/Nrf2/HO-1 Pathway by Inhibiting MicroRNA-222-3p to Prevent Oxidative Stress in Intestinal Epithelial Cells in Ulcerative Colitis and Colitis-Associated Colorectal Cancer
claims: Moxibustion regulates the BRG1/Nrf2/HO-1 pathway by inhibiting microRNA-222-3p, thereby reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in intestinal epithelial cells of UC and CAC mice.

title: What is the Healthy Gut Microbiota Composition? A Changing Ecosystem across Age, Environment, Diet, and Diseases
